description_long: This shotgun features a compact, robust design with a short barrel and a wooden fore-end and grip, accented by metallic gold and black components. The receiver and barrel assembly are predominantly black with gold trim, and the barrel has multiple vent holes along its length, suggesting a heat-dissipating design. The grip and fore-end are made of dark wood, providing a classic aesthetic and ergonomic handling. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, offering protection and ease of access to the trigger. The shotgun lacks a full stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for maneuverability in close quarters. The overall appearance is both functional and decorative, with a blend of traditional and modern elements suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, gold-accented shotgun with a short, vented black barrel and wooden pistol grip, blending classic and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the gold-trimmed receiver, vented black barrel, and wooden grip and fore-end.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the vent holes along the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the gold and wood detailing, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and grip shape.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vent holes along the top and sides of the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
